# Dr. Zainab Mohsin - Online Gynecology Consultations

> Expert guidance on pregnancy, safe delivery, and newborn care — from the comfort of home.

Dr. Zainab Mohsin is a verified Consultant Gynecologist with MBBS and FCPS qualifications and over 10 years of clinical experience. She has helped over 500+ mothers across Pakistan.

## Services
- Online Video Consultations (30 mins via Google Meet)
- Dedicated Masterclasses on Pregnancy and Baby Care

## Contact & Booking
- Book consultations directly at: https://gynae.vercel.app/booking
- WhatsApp support is available post-consultation.
